of VPA based on protein-binding saturation.", "The final population pharmacokinetic model predicts the individual clearance of a given pediatric patient administered with VPA monotherapy or pharmacokinetic study of valproic acid conducted to date in pediatric epilepsy patients, covering a large age range from 3 weeks to 14 years. The model was evaluated using two external datasets and showed good predictive performance." }
